title: Flipkart Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Flipkart Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Capital India has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Nashik office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Flipkart Capital India:
Flipkart Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Capital India!
